## Gloss, satin, matte films
Q² PPF EVO is a unique ceramic coating for Paint Protection Film. It is a very easy-to-apply, flexible, one-layer coating designed for all types of PPF and Vinyl, whether it be gloss, matte, or satin. The coating is formulated to enhance self-cleaning and maximize the hydrophobic properties of any automotive film while maintaining high durability.
Will not affect modern PPF's self-healing capabilities.
PH TOLERANCE:2-11
DURABILITY:up to 24 MONTHS

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-evo-coating_1.jpg?v=1702404310&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-evo_1.jpg?v=1702404310&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-banner_1.jpg?v=1702404310&width=2400)

BEST PRACTICES & PRO-TIPS
Q² PPF EVO must be applied like a regular coating with a criss-cross motion. Ensure good preparation of the paint protection film using Q²M PPF RENEW, followed by Q²M PREP for optimal surface bonding. 
**TIP:** Work with reflected light; it will make streaks or smudges more visible and help eliminate them over time. Use the Q²M Suede to perfect the finish.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-maintain_1.jpg?v=1702404310&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-ppf-maintain-400ml)

## PPF Maintain
PPF Maintain is made to keep films in tip top shape without yellowing and etching.

[
Shop GYEON PPF Maintain
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-ppf-maintain-400ml)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-renew_1.jpg?v=1702404310&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-ppf-renew-120ml)

## PPF Polish
Machine polish with PPF Renew to remove light imperfections without harming the film.

[
Shop GYEON PPF Renew
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-ppf-renew-120ml)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-wash_1.jpg?v=1702404310&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-ppf-wash-400ml)

## PPF Wash
Don't clay bar films; instead, use PPF Wash to clean and decontaminate PPF in one go.

[
Shop GYEON PPF Wash
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-ppf-wash-400ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-evo-banner_1.jpg?v=1702404310&width=2400)

Prevents yellowing
Q² PPF EVO has been designed to perform with all modern paint protection films, including coated and self-healing versions. It will enhance the color on both glossy and matte film without changing the finish.
The unique composition of Q² PPF EVO, featuring fluoro-modified polysilazanes, makes it the most durable and hydrophobic coating for PPF available. It remains very slick and easy to apply. It can be applied on both glossy or matte film, as well as on any vinyl wrap surface. It creates a slick, protective layer without compromising the self-healing abilities of the film.

- DURABILITY: ★★★★
- GLOSS: ★★★★★★
- BEADING: ★★★★★
- SELF-CLEANING: ★★★★★**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

# 

## GYEON PPF EVO Ceramic Coating 50ml

### Advanced quartz technology combined with user-friendly characteristics

| 
![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/evo-text_480x480.jpg?v=1639781124)

**MAJOR FEATURES**

| 

- UNIQUE, NEW FLUORO-MODIFIED POLYSILAZANES TECHNOLOGY

- SMOOTH, QUICK APPLICATION

- LAYERABLE IF DESIRED

| **BIGGEST IMPROVEMENT**
| 

- 100% MORE DURABILITY COMPARED TO THE CURRENT Q² PPF

- TIGHTER BEADS ON ALL TYPES OF PPF

- MORE CHEMICAL RESISTANCE AND DURABILITY

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__09_Leaflet_PPF_Maintenace_2022_WEB.pdf?v=1666391020)

Unique quartz coating for Paint Protection Film.
Q² PPF is very easy to apply flexible one layer coating for all types of PPF & Vinyl. It is designed to extend self-cleaning and maximize hydrophobic properties of any automotive film while being highly durable.

 BOX CONTAINS: Q² PPF EVO 50ML / APPLICATOR / 4 SUEDE CLOTHS

AVAILABLE CAPACITIES: 50 ML

## BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

Q² PPF must be applied like a regular coating with criss-cross motion. Ensure good preparation of the paint protection film using Q²M PPF RENEW follow by Q²M PREP for optimal surface bonding.TIP: Work with reflected light. It will make streaks or smudges more visible and help eliminate them in time. Use the Q²M Suede to perfect the finish.

CONSUMPTION: 15ml / layer

PH TOLERANCE: 2-11

DURABILITY: UP TO 24 MONTHS / 30K KMs

DURABILITY:    ★★★★

BEADING:     ★★★★✰

SELF-CLEANING:     ★★★★★

## FLEXIBLE ONE LAYER COATING

Q² PPF has been designed to match & perform with all modern paint protection film structure & self-healing properties.

## HARD & DURABLE

The unique chemical structure of Q² PPF makes it the hardest & coating for vinyl wrap & ppf on the market while being super slick & easy to apply.
Resistant It will add great chemical resistance & hydrophobic properties to the surface, creating a thick & slick layer of protection without compromising the self-healing capabilities of the film it been applied to.

Q² PPF is a flexible, one layer ceramic coating designed to protect `PPF and colour change wraps. 
The unique chemical composition of Q² PPF makes it the super slick and easy to apply. It will add great chemical resistance nd hydrophobic properties to the surface, creating a thick & slick layer of protection without compromising the self-healing capabilities of the film it been applied to. 

Application possible on all types of PPF. On used films, we highly recommend to prepare the film with Q²M PPF Renew. 

All GYEON products does ***not ***contain any Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances (PFAS / 'forever chemicals') as defined or restricted under the relevant Canadian environmental and chemical management regulations, including but not limited to:

- The Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA) and its associated

- Prohibition of Certain Toxic Substances Regulations, 2012 (SOR/2012-285), as amended;

- The Domestic Substances List and Non-domestic Substances List under CEPA;
Any applicable federal or provincial restrictions pertaining to PFAS substances.

Application

Considering you've already done all the necessary prep work, applying GYEON PPF EVO is very easy. Simply apply a few drops onto your applicator and work in a 2x2' criss-cross motion. Let it set for about ~2 minutes, then wipe off the excess with one microfiber and follow it up with another wipe using another clean towel.
PPF EVO is designed to go onto grabby and porous film surfaces, making it very easy to remove. If you've used a paint coating on films before, you'll notice that films will absorb coatings at an uneven rate, making it difficult to buff off and will leave a haze.

Outdoor-friendly application

All GYEON coatings can be applied outdoors. Ensure stable conditions, never use in direct sunlight and check the weather forecast! 
Cut down cure time to ~1 minute before wiping off.

Gloss, Satin, Matte films compatible.

PPF EVO will not 'add gloss' to a matte finish; it will enhance the color and the matte look, making it richer. It will do the same for satin films as well and works on colored vinyl wraps.

## GYEON PPF EVO FAQs

How long does it last?

Around 2 years, or more if applied multiple layers and maintained well with PPF Wash and PPF Maintain.

Does it add 'gloss' to matte or satin films?

No, but it will enhance the matte finish to a richer appearance, similar to applying lotion on dry hands. GYEON PPF EVO is fully matte film compatible.

When do I wipe it off?

Simply apply a few drops onto your applicator and work in a 2x2' criss-cross motion. Let it set for about ~2 minutes, then wipe off the excess with one microfiber and follow it up with another wipe using another clean towel.

What's the layering time?

Layering time is between 1 to 4 hours, and full curing occurs within 48 hours. You can take the vehicle out after 12 hours.

How much will the bottle do?

You'll use slightly more product than regular paint coatings because you want to apply more for the film to absorb into it as well. For a mid-sized sedan, you'll use around ~25 ml per coat; the 50ml bottle will be sufficient for you to do 2 layers.

After coating, when can I bring the vehicle out?

The vehicle can be driven the next day, or approximately 12 hours later. It is advisable to avoid exposing the coating to water within the first 24 hours.

How cold (or hot) can I apply the coating under?

A temperature of at least 10°C is recommended, although you can still attempt the application between 5°C to 10°C if necessary. If the temperature reaches 30°C, then it's on the warmer side, and you will need to retreat into the shade.

What do I maintain it with and how often?

Wash with GYEON PPF Wash; this is a decon-soap that is effective at removing contaminants without the need to use a clay bar (which can scratch your film). Top it with GYEON PPF Maintain to keep the water beading and prolong the coating's resistance to film yellowing.

I have a 'high-spot', what do I do?

High spots refer to dried coatings that were not completely buffed off. If you catch the high spots within 30 minutes, you can use the coating itself again to level/soften the high spots. If it's been a few days, then you'll need to mechanically polish it off with PPF Renew and reapply coating on the affected area.

What's the expiration date? New and opened.

Officially, Gyeon recommends the product to be used within 2 to 3 years when new. If the bottle has been opened, it's best to use up the product in 1 to 2 months to preserve the coating's maximum effectiveness.

Can it be shipped in the cold?

No problem at all. Coatings contain a significant amount of solvents and exhibit high chemical stability. For more details regarding winter shipping, please refer to our FAQ section on winter shipping.

Anything else I should know?

Make sure to use a little more product than regular paint coatings because films are much more porous than paint. You want enough product to be absorbed into the porous film as well and not only sit on top.
PPF EVO is a flexible coating that penetrates the film and will not affect the film's self-healing abilities. If your film already has a hydrophobic coating on it, it's encouraged for you to apply PPF EVO over it to prolong its OEM hydrophobic layer.
